asset_files.label: Qwen wide-face neutral portrait candidate from cp001-p03

source.story_role_cn: 听完卢植蒙冤后怒拔刀欲劫囚的张飞

notes: This asset is intended for face-first character dossier usage.
Clothing and accessories are intentionally minimized for later separate design.
The cp001-p03 neutral portrait is preferred over the angry p05 version for archive usage.
The cp001-p03 wide-face portrait is currently preferred because it gives Zhang Fei a broader, more forceful face shape.
